response.global_analysis: The video features a 3D collaboration of Hololive English -Justice- playing a 'Speed Block' game. The dialogue is entirely in English, and there is significant on-screen text including instructions, levels, and status messages. Subtitles are synchronized to the spoken English dialogue and key on-screen text, with segments split during natural pauses. Reference JSON confirms no vocal music is present.

subtitles.original: You got some tears in your eye. Look at you.
subtitles.english: You got some tears in your eye. Look at you.

subtitles.original: Smokey: You got 10 seconds to survive levels 1 and 2, then 30 seconds for levels 3 through 5.
subtitles.english: Smokey: You got 10 seconds to survive levels 1 and 2, then 30 seconds for levels 3 through 5.

subtitles.original: She's gonna sacrifice herself for us. That's so incredible.
subtitles.english: She's gonna sacrifice herself for us. That's so incredible.

subtitles.original: That's... that's nine more than one. She can count!
subtitles.english: That's... that's nine more than one. She can count!

subtitles.original: We can count to ten for you, okay?
subtitles.english: We can count to ten for you, okay?

subtitles.original: You at home, can you count?
subtitles.english: You at home, can you count?

subtitles.original: One... two... No, not yet! There's no time!
subtitles.english: One... two... No, not yet! There's no time!

subtitles.original: Okay, Gigi, go! Three, two, one, go!
subtitles.english: Okay, Gigi, go! Three, two, one, go!

subtitles.original: Oh, look at... it's blue and yellow and...
subtitles.english: Oh, look at... it's blue and yellow and...

subtitles.original: Four seconds! No way, it's impossible!
subtitles.english: Four seconds! No way, it's impossible!

subtitles.original: They're so far away from each other! We always believed in you!
subtitles.english: They're so far away from each other! We always believed in you!

subtitles.original: This one you will have to do like a thingy at the end.
subtitles.english: This one you will have to do like a thingy at the end.

subtitles.original: Now, pose to disarm the bomb!!
subtitles.english: Now, pose to disarm the bomb!!

subtitles.original: That's a difficult one. Why did the ghost do that?
subtitles.english: That's a difficult one. Why did the ghost do that?

subtitles.original: You're doing great. This is not shaped correctly.
subtitles.english: You're doing great. This is not shaped correctly.

subtitles.original: Disarm the bomb with a tongue twister!
subtitles.english: Disarm the bomb with a tongue twister!

subtitles.original: One-one was a race horse. Two-two was one too...
subtitles.english: One-one was a race horse. Two-two was one too...

subtitles.original: Why did they put this one so far?
subtitles.english: Why did they put this one so far?

subtitles.original: No! Gigi! She died for Justice!
subtitles.english: No! Gigi! She died for Justice!

subtitles.original: That was unfair! How do you do math in two seconds?
subtitles.english: That was unfair! How do you do math in two seconds?

subtitles.original: That's not fair! Quick math! Quick math!
subtitles.english: That's not fair! Quick math! Quick math!

subtitles.original: Smokey: Smells like a barbecue in here. You got 10 points!
subtitles.english: Smokey: Smells like a barbecue in here. You got 10 points!

subtitles.original: Ten?! I can't even count that high! Ten!
subtitles.english: Ten?! I can't even count that high! Ten!

subtitles.original: Smokey: That's enough, chatterboxes! You're up, Raora.
subtitles.english: Smokey: That's enough, chatterboxes! You're up, Raora.

subtitles.original: I don't want to become a burnt mess like Gigi.
subtitles.english: I don't want to become a burnt mess like Gigi.

subtitles.original: Wait, what? I'm clean again! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Wait, what? I'm clean again! Yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm ready to defuse the bomb! You got this!
subtitles.english: I'm ready to defuse the bomb! You got this!

subtitles.original: Okay, and in three, two, one, go!
subtitles.english: Okay, and in three, two, one, go!

subtitles.original: Light blue! Easy, easy! You got this!
subtitles.english: Light blue! Easy, easy! You got this!

subtitles.original: Wow, that's a lot of colors! Gosh!
subtitles.english: Wow, that's a lot of colors! Gosh!
